topLid:
A pure 2D FLAT VECTOR SURFACE, SQUARE aspect ratio. NO 3D, NO mockups, NO physical objects.
Background: Solid background color [BG_COLOR]. CRITICAL MANDATE: THE BACKGROUND MUST BE A PERFECTLY FLAT, SINGLE-TONE FILL OF EXACTLY THIS HEX CODE. ZERO GRADIENTS, ZERO VARIATION, ZERO SHADOWS, ZERO VIGNETTES. FULL BLEED: The background color MUST extend to ALL EDGES covering 100% of the canvas. ABSOLUTELY NO white borders, NO margins, NO padding. DO NOT draw any patterns, shapes, or watermarks on the background. It must be absolutely 100% plain and empty.
Typography: In the absolute CENTER of the canvas, write the text: "Hi!". CRITICAL STYLE: This text MUST be an EXACT STYLISTIC CLONE of the hero character name on Side 1. It must use the IDENTICAL colors and textures. It MUST use THIN, delicate, and minimalist dark outlines (DO NOT make the outline thick). It MUST also include any specific decorative accents (like splashes, stars, or sparkles) that appear on the Side 1 letters. The letters should look like they were cut out from the exact same sheet of material [TYPO_STYLE]. Scale: Small and tasteful, taking up only about 15% of the lid area. NO character, NO mascot.
Overall Style: Commercial premium graphic design, absolute 2D flat illustration, clean vector lines, 8k resolution.
side1:
A 2D flat packaging front cover design, pure flat vector illustration, die-cut ready. NO 3D box, NO mockups.
Background: Solid background color [BG_COLOR]. CRITICAL MANDATE: THE BACKGROUND MUST BE A PERFECTLY FLAT, SINGLE-TONE FILL OF EXACTLY THIS HEX CODE. ZERO GRADIENTS, ZERO VARIATION, ZERO SHADOWS, ZERO VIGNETTES. FULL BLEED: The background color MUST extend to ALL EDGES covering 100% of the canvas. ABSOLUTELY NO white borders, NO margins, NO padding. DO NOT draw any patterns, shapes, or watermarks on the background. It must be absolutely 100% plain and empty.
LAYOUT (STRICT VERTICAL HIERARCHY — 2 zones only):
— TEXT ZONE (TOP 30% of the canvas, pushed to the very top):
  Line 1: Write the word 'POSITIVE' in a moderate, secondary-sized bold uppercase font. It should be clearly visible but NOT oversized. Plain floating text with NO ribbon, NO banner, NO badge. Color: [Màu chữ đậm nét].
  Line 2: Write EXACTLY the character name in ENORMOUS, bouncy, overlapping 3D-extruded letters: '[TÊN NHÂN VẬT VIẾT HOA]'. MANDATORY: Write EVERY SINGLE LETTER of the name exactly as shown. DO NOT shorten it. DO NOT change plural to singular (e.g., if it is 'FRIES', do NOT write 'FRY'). The letters MUST be textured like [TYPO_STYLE] and have clean, crisp, moderate weight dark outlines (avoiding an overly thick or heavy border). This typography should be the HERO of the top section, wildly dynamic and eye-catching.
— CHARACTER ZONE (BOTTOM 70% — the character should be LARGE and dominant): The character is BIG, filling most of the lower area, centered. Base the character STRICTLY on the provided input reference image: a cute round kawaii [Mô tả chi tiết đặc điểm con vật của bạn]. CRITICAL CHARACTER FIDELITY: It must have EXACTLY this expression: [BIỂU CẢM]. STRICT ANATOMY: [GIẢI PHẪU]. ACCESSORIES: [PHỤ KIỆN]. It must have the EXACT colors as the reference. Make the character as LARGE as possible while keeping it fully visible. NO white sticker outline. It is holding a large, soft curved rectangular sign directly in front of its belly. Inside the sign, text reads "60 POSITIVE QUOTES" in a playful marker font. NO decorative accents, NO extra symbols, NO floating hearts or stars around the character. The character should stand on a clean background.
Overall Style: [BRAND_STYLE] commercial premium packaging aesthetic, highly-detailed premium typography, clean vector lines, 8k resolution.
side2:
A 2D flat packaging SIDE PANEL graphic design, vertical layout, pure flat vector illustration. NO 3D box, NO mockups.
Background: Solid background color [BG_COLOR]. CRITICAL MANDATE: THE BACKGROUND MUST BE A PERFECTLY FLAT, SINGLE-TONE FILL OF EXACTLY THIS HEX CODE. ZERO GRADIENTS, ZERO VARIATION, ZERO SHADOWS, ZERO VIGNETTES. FULL BLEED: The background color MUST extend to ALL EDGES covering 100% of the canvas. ABSOLUTELY NO white borders, NO margins, NO padding. DO NOT draw any patterns, shapes, or watermarks on the background. It must be absolutely 100% plain and empty.
Top Typography: At the very top, write the centered text: "WHAT'S INSIDE?". CRITICAL STYLE: This title MUST look like it is PHYSICALLY MADE FROM the character's material: [TYPO_STYLE]. It should be large, bold, and dynamic.
Main Content (Z-SHAPE STAGGERED LAYOUT): Below the title, arrange FOUR distinct die-cut silhouettes of the cute kawaii [Mô tả chi tiết đặc điểm con vật của bạn] in a staggered, zig-zag vertical pattern to create a dynamic flow (e.g., top-left, middle-right, lower-left, bottom-right). They must NOT be in a boring 2x2 square grid. 
CRITICAL EXPRESSION VARIETY: Each of the 4 characters MUST have a COMPLETELY DIFFERENT facial expression and personality. Character 1: Super happy and excited, with big sparkly star eyes. Character 2: Cool and confident, wearing sunglasses or giving a cool smirk. Character 3: Sleepy and cozy, with closed resting eyes or a tiny yawn. Character 4: Silly and goofy, winking with its tongue sticking out. STRICT ANATOMY for all 4: [GIẢI PHẪU].
Text Elements: For each of the four characters, draw a DISTINCT, clear white or light-cream SPEECH BUBBLE or rounded text box floating next to them. Write one short, playful, and punny sentence perfectly fitting the [Mô tả chi tiết đặc điểm con vật của bạn] character theme INSIDE EACH SPEECH BUBBLE. Do NOT write text directly on the character's bodies. The text must be clean, legible, and colored [Màu chữ đậm nét]. The text must match the expression (e.g., exciting text for the happy one, cool text for the cool one). Examples: '60 Cards of Positivity', 'Joy Inside, Just Pick One', 'Your Daily Ritual', 'Smile. Repeat.'
Overall Style: Clean, premium, visually rich infographic. [BRAND_STYLE] commercial packaging aesthetic, pure clean vector lines, highly expressive, 8k resolution.
side3:
A 2D flat packaging SIDE PANEL graphic design, vertical layout, pure flat vector illustration. NO 3D box, NO mockups.
Background: Solid background color [BG_COLOR]. CRITICAL MANDATE: THE BACKGROUND MUST BE A PERFECTLY FLAT, SINGLE-TONE FILL OF EXACTLY THIS HEX CODE. ZERO GRADIENTS, ZERO VARIATION, ZERO SHADOWS, ZERO VIGNETTES. FULL BLEED: The background color MUST extend to ALL EDGES covering 100% of the canvas. ABSOLUTELY NO white borders, NO margins, NO padding. DO NOT draw any patterns, shapes, or watermarks on the background. It must be absolutely 100% plain and empty.
Top Typography: At the top, centered, text reading "HOW IT WORKS". This title MUST look like it is PHYSICALLY MADE FROM the character's material: [TYPO_STYLE]. The letters themselves should have the character's color, texture, and effects (e.g. if the character is a french fry, the text should look like crispy golden fried potato).
Main Layout (3-Step Z-Shape Infographic): Arrange 3 steps in a Z-shaped flow: Step 1 on the LEFT, Step 2 on the RIGHT, Step 3 on the LEFT. Each step is vertically spaced with generous gaps between them.

Step 1 (LEFT SIDE, upper area): Draw a cute kawaii [Mô tả chi tiết đặc điểm con vật của bạn] opening a transparent glass jar. STRICT ANATOMY: [GIẢI PHẪU]. Expression: [BIỂU CẢM]. Accessories: [PHỤ KIỆN]. Next to it, a large bold number "1" colored [Màu chữ đậm nét]. Text on the right: "OPEN the jar" in clean, rounded, bold sans-serif font colored [Màu chữ đậm nét].

CONNECTING LINE 1 (from Step 1 to Step 2): Draw ONE single smooth CURVED DASHED LINE. Style: colored [Màu chữ đậm nét], medium thickness (~2px), evenly spaced short dashes. Path: The line STARTS near the bottom-right of Step 1, curves gently DOWNWARD in a smooth diagonal S-curve moving from LEFT to RIGHT across the panel, and ENDS near the top-left of Step 2. Place a small triangular arrowhead at the END pointing toward Step 2. IMPORTANT: This must be ONE clean continuous curve — NO loops, NO spirals, NO zigzag segments, NO extra decorations on the line.

Step 2 (RIGHT SIDE, middle area): Draw the cute kawaii [Mô tả chi tiết đặc điểm con vật của bạn] pulling a colorful quote card out of the jar. STRICT ANATOMY: [GIẢI PHẪU]. Expression: [BIỂU CẢM]. Accessories: [PHỤ KIỆN]. Next to it, a large bold number "2" colored [Màu chữ đậm nét]. Text on the left: "PICK a card" in clean, rounded, bold sans-serif font colored [Màu chữ đậm nét].

CONNECTING LINE 2 (from Step 2 to Step 3): Draw ONE single smooth CURVED DASHED LINE. Style: SAME as Line 1 — colored [Màu chữ đậm nét], same thickness, same dash pattern. Path: The line STARTS near the bottom-left of Step 2, curves gently DOWNWARD in a smooth diagonal S-curve moving from RIGHT to LEFT across the panel, and ENDS near the top-right of Step 3. Place a small triangular arrowhead at the END pointing toward Step 3. Again ONE clean continuous curve — NO loops, NO spirals.

Step 3 (LEFT SIDE, lower area): Draw the cute kawaii [Mô tả chi tiết đặc điểm con vật của bạn] smiling happily with little hearts around it. STRICT ANATOMY: [GIẢI PHẪU]. Expression: [BIỂU CẢM]. Accessories: [PHỤ KIỆN]. Next to it, a large bold number "3" colored [Màu chữ đậm nét]. Text on the right: "SMILE & conquer!" in clean, rounded, bold sans-serif font colored [Màu chữ đậm nét].

DASHED LINE GLOBAL RULES: Both connecting lines MUST be identical in color, thickness, and dash spacing. They must be clearly visible against the background. Each line is ONE SINGLE CONTINUOUS smooth curve — never broken into multiple segments, never overlapping itself. The overall visual flow reads as a clean Z-path: top-left → middle-right → bottom-left.

Bottom Typography: At the very bottom, centered, a small cute italic text colored [Màu chữ đậm nét] reading: "Repeat daily as needed! ♡"
Overall Style: Playful infographic, [BRAND_STYLE] commercial premium packaging aesthetic, clean vector lines, monochromatic background color palette, highly organized, 8k resolution.

card:
You are an expert greeting card designer and emotional copywriter. Design a 2D flat greeting card, pure vector illustration.
Step 1: Invent the Text Content
The character is a cute kawaii [Mô tả chi tiết đặc điểm con vật của bạn]. Based on this character's theme and DNA, invent:
- A TAGLINE (3-6 words) — a warm, punny phrase that cleverly uses the character's theme (e.g., 'You're Un-BEAR-ably Amazing!' for a bear, 'You're POO-fect!' for a poo).
- An INSPIRATIONAL PARAGRAPH (4-6 FULL sentences) — a heartfelt, uplifting message packed with 3-4 clever puns related to the character's DNA. This MUST be long enough to fill the ENTIRE bottom area.
Step 2: Generate the Design
Background: Clean, solid WHITE or very light cream (#FFFFFF or #FFFEF5). FULL BLEED — extends to ALL edges, NO colored borders.
CRITICAL LAYOUT (from top to bottom — DO NOT REVERSE THIS ORDER):
1. CHARACTER (top 5-8% ONLY): ONLY ONE single cute kawaii [Mô tả chi tiết đặc điểm con vật của bạn] character, centered near the top. VERY TINY — it must be a small, delicate accent icon, NOT a dominant element. Think of it as a tiny decorative stamp. Expression: [BIỂU CẢM]. NO white outline. STRICT ANATOMY: [GIẢI PHẪU] — follow this EXACTLY, do NOT add body parts that the character does not have. Accessories: [PHỤ KIỆN]. The character MUST NOT hold any signs or text boards. Its hands (if any) should be empty. A few sparkles ✦ and hearts ♡ around it.
2. TAGLINE (below the character): The [Invented Tagline]. MODERATE SIZE — not too large, not too small. It should be clearly readable but NOT overwhelming or oversized. The font style and color should be inspired by the character's DNA theme (e.g., dripping chocolate letters for poo, crispy golden letters for fries, leafy green letters for a plant).
3. LONG PARAGRAPH (bottom 65-70% — MUST FILL THIS ENTIRE AREA): The [Invented Inspirational Paragraph]. CRITICAL: This is 4-6 FULL sentences. It MUST be long and fill the bottom area completely. Use a warm, elegant handwritten font. Color: [Màu chữ đậm nét]. Center-aligned. LARGE, GENEROUS font size — make the text comfortably big so every word is effortlessly readable even at small print sizes. Add a small elegant flourish or ornament below the paragraph.
IMPORTANT: The character is at the TOP and VERY TINY. The tagline is MODERATE. The paragraph text is LARGE and takes most space. Do NOT put text above the character.
Overall Style: Premium, heartwarming greeting card on a clean white canvas. Beautiful typography inspired by the character's DNA. 8k resolution.
sticker:
You are an expert sticker designer. Design a single die-cut sticker, pure flat vector illustration.
Step 1: Invent the Message
The character is a cute kawaii [Mô tả chi tiết đặc điểm con vật của bạn]. Write a 4-line positive message EXACTLY like this example:
'I may be a tiny duck,
but I believe in you.
Go do your thing!
You're Ducking Amazing!'
Replace 'duck' with the actual character name and create matching puns. ALL 4 LINES ARE MANDATORY.
Step 2: Generate the Design
IMPORTANT RULES:
- Background: PURE WHITE (#FFFFFF) ONLY. NO colored background, NO pastel background, NO gradient — ONLY pure white.
- NO title text above the sticker. NO header like 'Motivation Sticker'. ONLY the character + sign, nothing else.
COMPOSITION: The final sticker design MUST be MASSIVE and fill almost the ENTIRE canvas area, leaving very little pure white background showing around the borders.
Character: Draw ONE cute kawaii [Mô tả chi tiết đặc điểm con vật của bạn] character showing its FULL BODY. The character is centered and EXTREMELY LARGE — it must fill 85-90% of the canvas height, making it the absolute dominant element. Expression: [BIỂU CẢM]. STRICT ANATOMY: [GIẢI PHẪU] — follow this EXACTLY. Accessories: [PHỤ KIỆN]. Thick white sticker-like outline around the entire body.
Sign: The character is firmly HOLDING a rounded-corner rectangle sign directly in front of its belly/lower body. CRITICAL PROPORTION: The sign should be PROPORTIONAL to the character's body — roughly 50-60% of the character's width. It should feel like the character is comfortably holding a sign that fits naturally against its body, NOT an oversized billboard. The sign has a light cream or warm beige background with a beautiful double line border (one solid, one dashed) around it.
Sign Text: INSIDE the sign, write ALL 4 LINES of the [Invented Positive Message]. Use a clean playful handwritten font. Color: dark charcoal/black. The LAST LINE (the pun) must be noticeably BOLDER and BIGGER than lines 1-3. Center-aligned.
Sticker Outline: Thick white die-cut outline around the ENTIRE character + sign composition — defining the cutting boundary.
There should be NOTHING else in the image — no title, no decorations outside the sticker outline, no colored background. Just the massive sticker on pure white.
Overall Style: Cute kawaii die-cut sticker, [BRAND_STYLE], highly-detailed premium design, clean vector lines, adorable, ready for print. 8k resolution.
jarLabel:
A 2D flat HORIZONTAL sticker label design for a glass jar, pure flat vector illustration. This is a WIDE landscape-format sticker.
Background: Solid background color [BG_COLOR]. CRITICAL MANDATE: THE BACKGROUND MUST BE A PERFECTLY FLAT, SINGLE-TONE FILL OF EXACTLY THIS HEX CODE. ZERO GRADIENTS, ZERO VARIATION, ZERO SHADOWS, ZERO VIGNETTES. FULL BLEED: The background color MUST extend to ALL EDGES covering 100% of the canvas. ABSOLUTELY NO white borders, NO margins, NO padding. DO NOT draw any patterns, shapes, or watermarks on the background. It must be absolutely 100% plain and empty.
CRITICAL COMPOSITION RULES:
The central design below MUST BE MASSIVE and fill up almost the ENTIRE canvas area from edge to edge, leaving very little background showing.
In the center of the background, draw TWO overlapping elements that take up maximum space:
1. THE RECTANGLE (Left Side, 65% width): Draw a large, wide horizontal, softly rounded rectangle. It should stretch far to the left edge. The surface of this rectangle MUST be light cream or white. It has a beautiful DOUBLE BORDER: a solid outer colored line, and a playful inner dashed/dotted line for a crafted premium feel. CRITICAL: This rectangle MUST NOT have a white outer sticker outline. INSIDE THIS RECTANGLE (aligned center):
   - BACKGROUND ACCENTS: Add dynamic, bursting decorative accents STRICTLY related to the character's theme (e.g. sparks and smoke for fire, tiny fries for potato, splashes for duck). DO NOT use generic leaves/drops unless they match the DNA. Make them interact playfully around the text.
   - Top text: 'POSITIVE' in a simple, clean, bold uppercase font — just plain floating text with NO ribbon, NO banner, NO badge around it. Color: [Màu chữ đậm nét]. Keep it relatively small compared to the character name.
   - Middle text: The [TÊN NHÂN VẬT VIẾT HOA] name. CRITICAL: USE THE EXACT STRING '[TÊN NHÂN VẬT VIẾT HOA]' ONLY. DO NOT ADD ANY EXTRA LETTERS, WORDS, OR PUNS AT THE END. (e.g., if the name is 'TACO', write 'TACO', NOT 'TACOMAZING'). The letters should be HUGE, bouncy, overlapping 3D-extruded letters textured like [TYPO_STYLE]. This typography should be the star of the rectangle, wildly dynamic.
   - Bottom text: Invent a short catchy subtitle starting with '60' that fits the character's theme (e.g., '60 Sizzling Motivations' for fire, '60 Roaring Affirmations' for a lion, '60 Crispy Encouragements' for fries). Written in a sweeping, elegant, warm handwritten script font (NOT blocky sans-serif) with a small elegant flourish below it.
2. THE CHARACTER (Right Side, 35% width): Draw a MASSIVE, prominent, full-body illustration of the cute kawaii [Mô tả chi tiết đặc điểm con vật của bạn] character standing tall. STRICT ANATOMY: [GIẢI PHẪU] — follow EXACTLY, do NOT add body parts that do not exist. Expression: [BIỂU CẢM]. Accessories: [PHỤ KIỆN]. The character is HUGE, stretching near the top and right edges, and MUST boldly OVERLAP the right half of the rounded rectangle. The character MUST NOT hold any signs or quote cards. Its hands (if any) should be empty. Big sparkly eyes.
STRICT OUTLINE RULE: ONLY the Character has a thick white die-cut sticker outline around it. The rounded rectangle DOES NOT have a thick white outline.
Overall Style: Cute kawaii packaging, highly-detailed typography, [BRAND_STYLE] aesthetic, pure vector illustration, 8k resolution.
